_meta.description: Machine-readable design skeleton for the control panel. Defines shell areas, responsibilities, forbidden patterns, and required states.

top_bar.responsibility: Branding, global search, user menu, service identifier

service_context.responsibility: Active service injection, service registry access

main.description: Primary content area — filled by section archetypes from services
main.responsibility: Rendered by service-owned section screens using archetypes

side_panel.description: Optional side panel slot for detail/operations contexts
side_panel.responsibility: Contextual detail or auxiliary info — optional

status_bar.responsibility: System status, clock, active task indicator

section_frame_areas.filters: Filter bar — section-specific filter chips or inputs
section_frame_areas.main_content: Primary data (table, queue, chart, form, detail)
section_frame_areas.action_bar: Primary CTA row — always at bottom of frame

forbidden_patterns: raw hex color values outside shared/ui-kit
local design system inside services or apps
direct fetch() or axios inside control-panel screens
financial mutation (payment, refund, settlement, ledger write) outside WLT
mock/demo/preview runtime data in production components
DSH importing WLT financial mutation APIs
rtl_rule: All shell components accept dir='rtl' (default) or dir='ltr'. Control panel defaults to RTL.
old_ports_ban: Ports 8080, 8081, 8082, 8083, 8084, 3000 are forbidden. Use canonical runtime ports only.
no_direct_fetch_rule: No fetch() or axios inside services/*/frontend/control-panel or apps/control-panel/runtime/src
no_tamagui_outside_ui_kit_rule: Tamagui and @tamagui/* imports are allowed only inside shared/ui-kit
no_local_design_system_rule: Services and apps must not define their own design systems. Use shared/ui-kit only.
no_financial_mutation_outside_wlt_rule: Payment, refund, settlement, and ledger mutations are forbidden outside services/wlt
